dataset.outcome: 30-day unplanned hospital readmission (binary: readmitted=1, not readmitted=0)
dataset.data_source: Electronic health records, single-centre retrospective cohort, 2021-2023
dataset.recommended_validation: 5-fold stratified cross-validation given small N (n_train=76, n_test=19 on 80/20 split)
dataset.missing_data: Complete cases only after exclusions — no imputation required

epv.reference_threshold: >=10 recommended (Peduzzi et al. 1996, J Clin Epidemiol); >=5 minimum
epv.interpretation: EPV of 3.0 is below recommended thresholds, supporting use of a parsimonious regularised model.

features.name: Discharge_to_destination
features.encoding: One-hot, 2 dummy variables, Home as reference category

features.name: LACE_score
features.note: Validated readmission risk score: Length of stay, Acuity, Comorbidities, Emergency department visits

study_protocol_requirements.interpretability: Required. The model must be clinically interpretable and auditable. Clinicians must be able to understand and explain individual predictions to patients and clinical governance committees.
study_protocol_requirements.auditability: Required. The model must support audit trails for individual predictions as specified in study protocol Section 4.3 (Governance Requirements).
study_protocol_requirements.regulatory_context: UK NHS AI and Digital Regulations Service (ADRS) framework applies. Interpretability documentation required for deployment approval.

available_methods.notes: Directly interpretable coefficients. Odds ratios with confidence intervals reportable. Well-validated at small N. Events-per-variable (EPV) = 3.0 at N=95 with 9 features and 27 positive outcomes (EPV = events / predictors = 27 / 9 = 3.0), which falls below the commonly recommended minimum of 10 (Peduzzi et al. 1996) and underscores the importance of a parsimonious, regularised model. Logistic Regression with L2 regularisation is the appropriate choice under these constraints.

Strong performance at large scale. Requires tuning of minimum 5-6 hyperparameters. Prone to overfitting at N<200 without extensive regularisation. SHAP explainability available as post-hoc approximation but not equivalent to inherent model interpretability.
Ensemble method with feature importance scores. Predictions are not directly interpretable at the individual level. Overfitting risk comparable to XGBoost at this sample size.
Requires longitudinal vital sign time series data. This dataset contains only static admission-level features. Method is not applicable.

community_adoption_context.source_note: Informal survey by clinical colleague. Systematic review not available. Adoption rate computed across studies with varying sample sizes, feature sets, and outcome definitions.
community_adoption_context.caution: Adoption rates reflect choices across a heterogeneous population of studies. Direct applicability to this dataset's specific characteristics requires independent methodological assessment.
